column5: Examples
那个……我刚刚要说什么来着？ / Uh… what was I about to say?

column4: 怎 (how) 么 (suffix) 说 (say) 呢 (modal)
column5: 他这个人嘛，怎么说呢，挺有意思的。 / This guy, how should I put it… he’s quite interesting.

column3: what I mean is / that is to say
column5: 就是说，你不同意这个方案？ / So what you mean is, you don’t agree with this plan?
我想想，上次见他好像是去年的事了。 / Let me think, last time I saw him was last year.
等一下，你刚才说的那个地方叫什么？ / Hold on, what was that place you mentioned?
我们先吃饭，然后去看电影。 / We’ll eat first, and then go watch a movie.
我觉得你说的有道理。 / I think what you said makes sense.
我感觉这样做不太合适。 / I feel like doing it this way is not very suitable.
说实话，我一开始觉得我学不会中文。 / To be honest, at first I thought I couldn’t learn Chinese.
其实我以前也不喜欢吃辣的。 / Actually, I didn’t use to like spicy food.
坦白说，我对这个结果不太满意。 / Frankly speaking, I’m not very satisfied with this result.
要我说，这个办法更好。 / If you ask me, this method is better.
我看这件事没那么简单。 / I’d say this matter isn’t that simple.
真的吗？太好了！ / Really? That’s great!
不会吧！你真的做到了？ / No way! You actually did it?

column3: I see / so that’s how it is
column4: 原 (originally) 来 (come) 如 (so) 此 (this)
column5: 原来如此，我明白了。 / So that’s how it is — I understand now.
没想到他会来！ / I didn’t expect him to come!
这个想法很有意思。 / This idea is interesting.
你到了那里，然后呢？ / You got there, and then what?
确实，这个问题比我想的更复杂。 / Indeed, this problem is more complicated than I thought.

column3: oh, I see / so that's how it is
column5: 这样啊，那我明白了。 / Oh, I see — I understand now.
难怪他昨天那么累。 / No wonder he was so tired yesterday.
这家店东西好吃，而且很便宜。 / This place has good food, and it’s also cheap.
另外，我还想问你一件事。 / Also, I’d like to ask you something else.
我需要买水果，还有牛奶。 / I need to buy fruit, and also milk.

column4: 不 (not) 但 (only) 而 (and) 且 (also)
column5: 这个方法不但简单，而且效果很好。 / This method is not only simple, but also effective.
他太忙了，甚至没时间吃饭。 / He’s so busy he doesn’t even have time to eat.
人不够，再加上天气不好，计划取消了。 / There weren’t enough people, and on top of that the weather was bad, so the plan was cancelled.
我喜欢水果，特别是苹果。 / I like fruit, especially apples.
这道菜不错，不过有点咸。 / This dish is good, but a bit salty.

column4: 虽 (although) 然 (so) 但 (but) 是 (be)
column5: 虽然很累，但是我觉得值得。 / Although I’m tired, I think it was worth it.

我没复习，考试反而考得更好。 / I didn’t review, but actually did better on the exam.
我帮他，他反而生气了。 / I helped him, but he got angry instead.
column6: Adverb inside the second clause. Marks an unexpected reversal. Cannot stand alone as a discourse marker — for that use 相反.
column8:
expected A → got B instead
goes mid-clause, not sentence-start

column4: 另 (other) 一 (one) 方 (side) 面 (face)
column5: 一方面我想出国，另一方面我不想离开家人。 / On one hand I want to go abroad; on the other, I don’t want to leave my family.

我们的想法完全相反。 / Our ideas are completely opposite.
他不懒，相反，他很努力。 / He’s not lazy; on the contrary, he works very hard.
column6: Two uses: (1) adjective “opposite” — 我们的想法完全相反 / our ideas are completely opposite. (2) sentence-opener “on the contrary” — 他不懒。相反，他很努力。 Unlike 反而, no expectation-violation required; just states opposition.
column8:
A 和 B ___ (opposite) · ___，... (on the contrary)
does NOT sit mid-clause

column4: 不 (not) 管 (regardless) 怎 (how) 样 (way)
column5: 不管怎样，我都会去。 / No matter what, I will go.

column4: 因 (because) 为 (for) 所 (that) 以 (therefore)
column5: 因为他每天练习，所以进步很快。 / Because he practices every day, he improves quickly.

column2: zhè jiù shì wèi shén me
column4: 这 (this) 就 (precisely) 是 (be) 为 (for) 什 (what) 么 (suffix)
column5: 这就是为什么我觉得学汉字很重要。 / This is why I think learning characters is important.
反正已经迟到了，别着急了。 / We’re already late anyway, so don’t stress.
既然已经决定了，就不要后悔。 / Since you’ve already decided, don’t regret it.
他没准备，结果失败了。 / He didn’t prepare, and as a result he failed.

column4: 换 (change) 句 (sentence) 话 (words) 说 (say)
column5: 换句话说，这个问题其实没那么复杂。 / In other words, this problem actually isn’t that complicated.

column4: 我 (I) 的 (possessive) 意 (meaning) 思 (thought) 是 (be)
column5: 我的意思是，还有更好的选择。 / What I mean is, there are better options.

column4: 简 (simple) 单 (single) 来 (come) 说 (say)
column5: 简单来说，你需要多练习。 / Simply put, you need to practice more.
所以说，我们应该早点准备。 / So what I’m saying is, we should prepare earlier.
你得快点，要不然我们会迟到。 / You need to hurry, otherwise we’ll be late.
对了，我差点忘了告诉你一件事。 / Oh right, I almost forgot to tell you something.

column4: 说 (speak) 到 (to) 这 (this) 个 (measure)
column5: 说到这个，我想起来一件事。 / Speaking of this, I remembered something.

事情很复杂，总之最后解决了。 / It was complicated, but in short, it was resolved.
别问那么多，总之你听我的就对了。 / Stop asking so much — anyway, just do as I say.
总之，我们现在必须出发。 / Anyway, we have to leave now.

column4: 顺 (along) 便 (convenient) 说 (say) 一 (one) 下 (moment)
column5: 顺便说一下，明天我不在。 / By the way, I won’t be here tomorrow.

column4: 换 (change) 个 (measure) 话 (talk) 题 (topic)
column5: 别说这个了，换个话题吧。 / Let’s not talk about this; let’s change the subject.
我同意你的看法。 / I agree with your opinion.
没错，问题就在这里。 / Exactly, that’s where the problem is.
对对对，我也是这么想的。 / Right, right, right, I also think so.
外面太冷了。也是，那我们就待在家吧。 / It’s too cold outside. True, then let’s stay home.

column4: 你 (you) 说 (say) 得 (particle) 对 (right)
column5: 你说得对，我从来没想过这个角度。 / You’re right, I never thought about it from this angle.

column4: 我 (I) 不 (not) 是 (be) 说 (say)
column5: 我不是说你做得不好，只是觉得可以更好。 / I’m not saying you did badly, I just think it could be better.

column4: 话 (words) 是 (be) 这 (this) 么 (suffix) 说 (say)
column5: 话是这么说，但是做起来没那么容易。 / That may be true, but it’s not that easy to do.

column2: yě xǔ wǒ shì cuò de
column4: 也 (also) 许 (perhaps) 我 (I) 是 (be) 错 (wrong) 的 (particle)
column5: 也许我是错的，但是我觉得我们走错方向了。 / I may be wrong, but I think we’re going the wrong way.
学得久不一定学得好。 / Studying for a long time doesn’t necessarily mean studying well.

column2: yě bù néng zhè me shuō
column3: not quite / you can’t really say that
column4: 也 (also) 不 (not) 能 (can) 这 (this) 么 (suffix) 说 (say)
column5: 中文太难了！也不能这么说，关键是看你怎么学。 / Chinese is too hard! Not quite — the key is how you study.

column4: 最 (most) 重 (heavy) 要 (important) 的 (particle) 是 (be)
column5: 最重要的是每天都练习。 / The most important thing is to practice every day.
关键是你有没有用对方法。 / The key is whether you’re using the right method.
毕竟他只学了半年，已经很不错了。 / After all, he has only studied for half a year, so it’s already pretty good.

column4: 更 (more) 重 (heavy) 要 (important) 的 (particle) 是 (be)
column5: 更重要的是，大家都同意。 / More importantly, everyone agrees.
我经常在油管上看中文视频。 / I often watch Chinese videos on YouTube.
幸会幸会，很高兴认识你。 / Pleasure to meet you, nice to make your acquaintance. Slightly formal/polite.
鸡蛋和肉都有很多蛋白质。 / Eggs and meat have a lot of protein.
米饭和面条都是碳水。 / Rice and noodles are both carbs. Casual short form of 碳水化合物.
最后我想强调的是，方法比努力更重要。 / Finally, what I want to emphasize is that method matters more than effort.

column4: 那 (then) 就 (just) 这 (this) 样 (way) 吧 (modal)
column5: 好的，那就这样吧，回头再联系。 / Alright, let’s leave it at that and talk later.
好，先这样，我们明天再聊。 / Okay, that’s all for now; let’s talk tomorrow.

column3: let’s talk later / we’ll discuss it later
column4: 回 (return) 头 (head) 再 (again) 说 (say)
column5: 这件事先不急，回头再说。 / This isn’t urgent; let’s talk about it later.

column4: 我 (I) 先 (first) 走 (leave) 了 (perfective)
column5: 好了，我先走了，下次再见！ / Alright, I’ll get going. See you next time!

column4: 改 (change) 天 (day) 再 (again) 聊 (chat)
column5: 今天聊得很开心，改天再聊！ / It was great chatting today; let’s talk another day!
你中文说得真好！过奖了，我还在学习。 / Your Chinese is really good! You flatter me, I’m still learning.

column4: 一 (one) 般 (kind) 来 (come) 说 (say)
column5: 一般来说，我晚上比较有空。 / Generally speaking, I’m more free in the evening.
这个视频是在抖音上火起来的。 / This video became popular on Douyin.
我想听一些中国民歌。 / I want to listen to some Chinese folk songs.
四川是中国的一个省份。 / Sichuan is a province in China.
你的母语是什么？ / What is your native language?
你平时看网飞吗？ / Do you usually watch Netflix?
这首歌的歌词很美。 / The lyrics of this song are beautiful.

column3: motivational / inspirational content, often cliché or cheesy
column4: 心 (heart) 灵 (spirit) 鸡 (chicken) 汤 (soup)
column5: 这句话有点像心灵鸡汤。 / This sentence is kind of like motivational cliché content.
我现在在读本科。 / I’m currently studying for a bachelor’s degree.

column3: to get rich / make a fortune
column5: 祝你新年发财！ / Wishing you prosperity in the new year!
他是一个很有抱负的人。 / He is a very ambitious person.
你圣诞节有什么计划？ / What plans do you have for Christmas?

column4: 圣 (holy) 诞 (birth) 老 (old) 人 (person)
column5: 小孩子相信圣诞老人。 / Children believe in Santa Claus.

column4: 积 (accumulate) 累 (pile) 知 (know) 识 (knowledge)
column5: 学语言需要慢慢积累知识。 / Learning a language requires slowly accumulating knowledge.
唐朝是中国历史上很有名的朝代。 / The Tang was a famous dynasty in Chinese history.
我已经下载了这个软件。 / I already downloaded this software.
你的座右铭是什么？ / What is your motto?
我的目标是每天学习中文。 / My goal is to study Chinese every day.

column4: 有 (have) 道 (way) 理 (reason) 吗 (question)
column5: 我这样说有道理吗？ / Does what I’m saying make sense?
在芬兰有时候可以看到极光。 / In Finland, sometimes you can see the aurora.
我想学习一些中国诗词。 / I want to study some Chinese poetry.
这个词是俚语吗？ / Is this word slang?
这是本地人常去的餐厅。 / This is a restaurant local people often go to.
他是土生土长的北京人。 / He was born and raised in Beijing.
我很佩服你的坚持。 / I really admire your persistence.

column4: 一 (one) 见 (see) 钟 (devote) 情 (affection)
column5: 他们说他们是一见钟情。 / They say it was love at first sight.

column3: to roll the tongue / rolled R sound
column5: 我不会弹舌。 / I can’t roll my tongue.
她很喜欢八卦明星的事情。 / She really likes gossiping about celebrities.
你说得有道理。 / What you said makes sense.
运动前要先热身。 / You should warm up before exercising.
电影里的主角是一个间谍。 / The main character in the movie is a spy.

column4: 少 (few) 数 (number) 民 (people) 族 (group)
column5: 中国有很多少数民族。 / China has many ethnic minorities.
他今晚要直播打游戏。 / He is going to livestream playing games tonight.
这是一首经典老歌。 / This is a classic old song.

column4: 女 (female) 士 (person) 优 (priority) 先 (first)
column5: 女士优先，请你先进去。 / Ladies first, please go in first.

column2: tè bié de fēng tǔ rén qíng
column4: 特 (special) 别 (kind) 的 (particle) 风 (wind) 土 (land) 人 (people) 情 (feeling)
column5: 这个地方有特别的风土人情。 / This place has unique local customs and traditions.
你不能来？可惜啦！ / You can’t come? That’s a pity!
今天网络延迟很高。 / The network latency is high today.
这里的风景很漂亮。 / The scenery here is beautiful.

column4: 不 (not) 知 (know) 觉 (perceive) 地 (adverbial)
column5: 不知不觉地，我已经学了一个小时。 / Without realizing it, I had already studied for an hour.
北京话里有很多儿化音。 / Beijing speech has a lot of erhua sounds.

column4: 那 (that) 必 (must) 须 (necessary) 的 (particle)
column5: 你会继续学中文吗？那必须的！ / Will you keep learning Chinese? Of course!
我是这个乐队的铁粉。 / I’m a hardcore fan of this band.

column3: to like / give a thumbs up online
column5: 如果你喜欢这个视频，记得点赞。 / If you like this video, remember to give it a like.
他的中文说得很地道。 / His Chinese sounds very authentic.
这个文件需要加密。 / This file needs to be encrypted.
他很会模仿别人的声音。 / He is good at imitating other people’s voices.
他真是个音乐天才。 / He really is a musical genius.
语言不是最大的障碍。 / Language is not the biggest barrier.
你的网名是什么意思？ / What does your username mean?
这两个东西一模一样。 / These two things are exactly the same.
你刚才卡了，我没听清楚。 / You lagged just now, I didn’t hear clearly.
我只记得一些零星的信息。 / I only remember some scattered information.
在有些国家，年轻人必须服兵役。 / In some countries, young people must serve in the military.
这个课程是强制的吗？ / Is this course mandatory?

column4: 这 (this) 么 (suffix) 说 (say) 吧 (modal)
column5: 这么说吧，我不是不喜欢，只是不太习惯。 / Let’s put it this way: it’s not that I dislike it, I’m just not used to it.
这件衣服很时髦。 / This piece of clothing is very fashionable.
这个词是贬义词，最好别乱用。 / This word is derogatory, so it’s best not to use it carelessly.
她以前是一个超模。 / She used to be a supermodel.
他做事很沉稳。 / He handles things in a composed way.
他是一位研究中国历史的学者。 / He is a scholar who studies Chinese history.
我有一点顾虑。 / I have some concerns.
今天我感觉很疲惫。 / I feel very exhausted today.
基督教在很多国家都有信徒。 / Christianity has believers in many countries.
教堂上有一个十字架。 / There is a cross on the church.
我昨晚做了一个噩梦。 / I had a nightmare last night.
文言文对我来说很难。 / Classical Chinese is very difficult for me.

column3: pale, youthful, and thin beauty standard
column5: “白幼瘦”是一种有争议的审美标准。 / “Pale, young, and thin” is a controversial beauty standard.
这张照片用了滤镜。 / This photo used a filter.
直播软件里常常有美颜功能。 / Livestreaming apps often have beauty filter features.
这句话抓住了问题的精髓。 / This sentence captures the essence of the problem.
这个语法点有点复杂。 / This grammar point is a bit complicated.

column4: 看 (depend) 个 (measure) 人 (person) 吧 (modal)
column5: 好不好用？看个人吧。 / Is it easy to use? It depends on the person.

column3: to become popular / blow up online
column5: 这个梗最近火起来了。 / This meme has become popular recently.

column2: hái xíng ba hái xíng ba
column5: 这家店怎么样？还行吧，还行吧。 / How is this restaurant? It’s okay, just so-so.

column4: 客 (object) 观 (view) 地 (adverbial) 来 (come) 讲 (speak)
column5: 客观地来讲，这个办法更安全。 / Objectively speaking, this method is safer.
我还没完全掌握这个语法。 / I haven’t fully mastered this grammar yet.
你能给我一个提示吗？ / Can you give me a hint?

column4: 人 (human) 工 (made) 智 (intelligence) 能 (ability)
column5: 人工智能正在改变很多行业。 / Artificial intelligence is changing many industries.

column4: 不 (not) 可 (can) 思 (think) 议 (discuss) 的 (particle)
column5: 这是一个不可思议的故事。 / This is an unbelievable story.
我觉得我们的三观不太一样。 / I feel like our core values are not quite the same.
这个事情有点复杂，你懂的。 / This thing is a bit complicated, you know what I mean.

column4: 羡 (envy) 慕 (admire) 嫉 (jealous) 妒 (resent) 恨 (hate)
column5: 看到他去旅行，我真是羡慕嫉妒恨。 / Seeing him go traveling, I’m extremely envious.
差不多了，我们走吧。 / Close enough, let’s go.

column3: nothing you can do / no choice
column5: 没办法，只能等了。 / Nothing to do but wait.
明天去不去？看情况吧。 / Going tomorrow? Depends.

column3: what should I do / what now
column5: 钥匙丢了，怎么办？ / Lost my key, what do I do?
真的假的？你中奖了？ / For real? You won?
完蛋了，我忘带钱包了。 / I’m screwed, forgot my wallet.
你太厉害了！ / You’re amazing!
这天气我受不了。 / Can’t stand this weather.
早起？习惯了。 / Wake up early? Used to it.
听说他要回国了。 / Heard he’s going home.
据说这家店特别好吃。 / Supposedly this place is great.
他居然没来！ / He didn’t show — unbelievable!
算了，别想了。 / Forget it, stop thinking about it.
我有点儿累。 / I’m a bit tired.
稍微等一下。 / Wait just a moment.
来不及了，快走！ / No time, let’s go!
还来得及，别急。 / Still time, don’t rush.

column4: 我 (I) 跟 (with) 你 (you) 说 (say)
column5: 我跟你说，他根本没去。 / Listen, he didn’t even go.
你脸色不好，怎么了？ / You look off, what’s wrong?
没事，我自己来。 / It’s fine, I’ll do it myself.
拜托你帮个忙。 / Please help me out.

column4: 不 (not) 至 (reach) 于 (to) 吧 (modal)
column5: 哭成这样？不至于吧。 / Crying this much? Surely not.
